title: Course details
body:
Note: Most of this information is already posted in Simple Syllabus.

TEAM

Instructor: Velibor Adzic

Email: vadzic@fau.edu (preferred contact by direct message in Canvas)

Office hours: EE 525, Tuesdays 9:30AM – 11:30AM

Grading TA: Md Robiul Hassan

Email: hassanm2023@fau.edu

 

TEXTBOOK

Applied Discrete Structures
Open Access: https://discretemath.org/

 

GRADE COMPONENTS

Homeworks (8) = 40%

Exam 1 = 20%
Exam 2 = 20%

Participation = 10% (Attendance is NOT mandatory, participation graded using online quizzes).

Labs = 10%

LABS

Lab section is fully managed by your lab's TA.

Lab TA: Abit Jurkuch

Anything related to the lab needs to be communicated with the TA first.

 

ADDITIONAL TUTORING

Center for Learning and Student Success: https://www.fau.edu/class/esuccess/online-academic-support/

(find tutors for "COT 2000c" on the page)
